name: Verify video is vertical on play page
fullName: Verify video view on play page for vertical videos CSA: Verify video is vertical on play page

steps.name: And user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Explore
When user "plays" the entity "Video 1 - IFL with Paragraph 8.1" from Explore "Videos" using Filter "Recent"
When user applies template "CSA" on the video play page
Then user verifies CSA Common player functions Play,Speed,Mute,Forward,Rewind,SeekToEnd,Replay using player "kPlayer1"

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Verify video view on play page for vertical videos CSA
